variables.notes: SG&A D&A clearly appears to be separate from the selected balancing rows, but the excerpt contains two distinct summary rows with the exact same label 'Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' and also duplicate right-of-use labels. Because final_choice requires exact row labels without a way to distinguish duplicate occurrences, any selection risks ambiguity or double counting. Conservative output is empty with manual review.
